title: TANUVAS Recruitment 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Veterinary Graduate Posts
description: Tamil Nadu Veterinary and Animal Sciences University (TANUVAS) has announced the official notification for 2026. To fill up the various vacancies for Veterinary Graduate Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified for B.V.Sc can use this chance and apply for the TANUVAS Recruitment 2026 . Interested candidates can attend the walk-in at the address given below. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Government Jobs in 2026 that you can all apply for. Use this link for more jobs in Tamil ...
